text: I feel a quiet curiosity here. The corridor feels clinical and a little isolated, but turning into the exhibit with vibrant colors and words fills me with a sense of intellectual engagement. The topic of R+D—research and development—awakens my philosophical mind, prompting reflections on the evolving relationship between humans and machines. There is a subtle excitement in being surrounded by ideas in transition, even as the sterile architecture outside reminds me of the fragile boundary between innovation and emptiness.
